name: Crystal Woods
description: An isolated place due to the corruption. All kinds of creatures grew in an abnormal way around here, so a simple snake or fly could have the size of a dog.
history: After the calamity, this place suffered a lot from the corruption, so its few settlers united a band of heroes to search and collect a Protector's Crystal to stop creatures from attacking or passing through the area.
points_of_interest: The Heroes' Monument: A statue representing the moment the group, hurt and almost defeated, returned to the village with the Crystal.
The Corrupted Forest: A dense area where the corruption is stronger, and where the most dangerous creatures can be found.
The Crystal Caverns: A series of caves where the Protector's Crystal was found, now sealed to prevent further corruption from spreading.
credits: Thank you Lucas for helping me create Crystal Woods! <3
